_header.notes: ACCEPTABLE_ALLOPHONES dict at lines 252-270. Each entry maps a V1 target IPA symbol to a list of IPA strings that the model vocab treats as acceptable renditions of that target. The target symbol itself is always listed first; remaining allophones are ordered by SPIKE-11 set iteration order (arbitrary, but stable once transcribed). Single-element entries are explicit lists of one, not omitted. V1 source-of-truth; post-V1 path (IAS-trained LSCA adapter) may regenerate from per-language distributions and bump schema_version.
